Author: Nainaiowo
Name: Better Deaths
Description: Records party deaths with pull grouping, fatal events, active statuses, and recent action timelines.
Changelog:
Refined Death Replay playback so the timeline starts at the 30-second lead-up and stops at useful post-death replay data while keeping active draws visible.
Cleaned up the Death Replay view by removing redundant helper text and giving the replay canvas more side spacing.
Removed excluded-player capture filtering and settings.
Enemy HP at death now only lists targetable enemies.
Added a small shared-credit note to the header when space allows.
